channel.title: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
channel.description:
Hi!
I really love Frontity after only playing around with it for a few hours. I added some nice stuff to the Mars theme, all works well locally and with npx frontity serve. But as soon as I deploy to Vervel (with or without --prod) I get an "Internal server error". So i started over with a 100% clean app and it works. So I added the following things and it broke again: - Custom REST API url: https://ubierfestival.nl/wp-hike-test/wp-json; - Added @frontity/head-tags (as a package and in my frontity.settings.js); - added a custom field to post.js.
That's all, but it still gives me the error on Vercel after deployment :(
My repo can be found here: https://github.com/sjaakbanaan/frontity-mars And here's the broken app: https://frontity-mars.vercel.app/
Anyone with tips? Or should I knock on Vercel's door? Thanks!

item.title: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
davidtuk:

This topic can be closed (even removed?) now

Let’s leave it open so others facing the same problem can find your solution

And @davidtuk welcome to Frontity!

Read full topic
item.source: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"

item.title: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
item.dc:creator: davidtuk
item.description:
It’s back up!

Edit: ok I figured it out… I accidentally removed the A record for this domain (so there were only AAAA records for ipv6) so the json file wasnt accessible everywhere… So that was a wise lesson haha. This topic can be closed (even removed?) now

Read full topic
item.source: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"

item.title: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
item.dc:creator: davidtuk
item.description:
Hi Santos, it appears the domain is down indeed. I can’t even ping it right now. I will let you know when it’s back up!

Read full topic
item.source: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"

item.title: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Hi @davidtuk! Welcome to the community, really glad that you liked Frontity so far

I’ve tried to check your REST API url but it doesn’t work for me. Could you confirm if it’s correct to check what could be the problem please?

Read full topic
item.source: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"

item.title: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
item.dc:creator: davidtuk
item.description:
Hi!

I really love Frontity after only playing around with it for a few hours. I added some nice stuff to the Mars theme, all works well locally and with npx frontity serve. But as soon as I deploy to Vervel (with or without --prod) I get an “Internal server error”. So i started over with a 100% clean app and it works. So I added the following things and it broke again:

  • Custom REST API url: https://ubierfestival.nl/wp-hike-test/wp-json;
  • Added @frontity/head-tags (as a package and in my frontity.settings.js);
  • added a custom field to post.js.

That’s all, but it still gives me the error on Vercel after deployment

My repo can be found here: https://github.com/sjaakbanaan/frontity-mars
And here’s the broken app: https://frontity-mars.vercel.app/

Anyone with tips? Or should I knock on Vercel’s door? Thanks!

Read full topic
item.source: "Internal Server Error" on vercel after adding only "@frontity/head-tags"
